markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Draft.js

Draft.js is a framework for building rich text editors in React.

Table of Contents

  • Communitystars2.3k
  • Presentationsstars2.3k
  • Projects on Top of Draft.jsstars2.3k
  • Common Utilitiesstars2.3k
  • Blog Posts & Articlesstars2.3k
  • Live Demosstars2.3k
  • Usage in Productionstars2.3k
  • Licensestars2.3k

Community

  • Slack channel

Presentations

  • Rich Text Editing with React @ React.js Conf 2016 by Isaac Salier-Hellendag
  • Rich text editing with Draft.js & DraftJS Plugins by Nik Graf
  • React Ep. 37: Draftjs by What I Learned Today – Atomic Jolt
  • 008 - Draft.js Plugins @ React30
  • Draft.js at HubSpot by Ben Briggs
  • Draft.js under the hood - React Melbourne meetup

Standalone Editors Built on Draft.js

  • Draft WYSIWYGstars454 - WYSIWYG editor that with drag&drop, resizing & tooltips.
  • Draft.js Editorstars146 - A Rich text editor inspired by Medium & Facebook Notes.
  • React-RTEstars2.5k - A full-featured textarea replacement similar to CKEditor or TinyMCE.
  • Facebook Notes Clone(ish)stars225 - Rich text editor similar to Facebook notes.
  • Megadraftstars995 - A rich text editor with a nice default base of plugins and extensibility.
  • Medium Draftstars1.6k - Medium-like rich text editor with a focus on keyboard shortcuts.
  • React-Draft-Wyiswygstars5k - A WYISWYG editor, with various text editing options and corresponding HTML generation.
  • Dante 2stars912 - Just another Medium clone built on top of DraftJs.
  • Last Draftstars213 - A Draft editor built with Draft.js plugins.
  • Z-Editorstars101 - Online Z-notations editor.
  • Draftailstars429 - A configurable rich text editor based on Draft.js, built for Wagtail.
  • Braftstars4k - Extensible Draft JS Editor

Plugins and Decorators Built for Draft.js

  • Draft.js Pluginsstars3.8k - A Plugin architecture on top of Draft.js
    • Alignment
    • Block Breakoutstars41 - Break out of block types as you type.
    • Buttonsstars93
    • Color Pickerstars93
    • Counter - Character, word & line counting.
    • Divider
    • Drag and Drop
    • Embedstars93
    • Emoji - Slack-like emoji support
    • EmojiPickerstars93
    • Focus
    • GifPickerstars93
    • Hashtags - Twitter-like hashtag support
    • Image
    • Inline Toolbar
    • Katexstars31 - Insert and render LaTeX using Katex.
    • Linkstars93
    • Linkify - Automatically turn links into anchor-tags.
    • Liststars10 - Automatic list creation, nested lists
    • Markdown Shortcutsstars258 - Markdown syntax shortcuts.
    • Mathjax - Edit math using (La)TeX rendered by Mathjax.
    • Mention - Twitter-like mention support
    • Modalstars93
    • Prismstars47 - Syntax highlight code blocks with Prism.
    • Resizeable
    • RichButtonsstars40 - Add and customize rich formatting buttons.
    • Side Toolbar
    • Sidebarstars93
    • Single Linestars37 - Restrict to a single line of input.
    • Sticker - Facebook-like sticker support
    • Toolbarstars93
    • Undo - Undo & Redo button.
    • Video
  • Draft.js Gutterstars15 - Compliments line number gutter.
  • Draft.js Basic HTML Editorstars83 - Accept html as its input format, and return html to an onChange.
  • Draft.js Prismstars267- Highlight code blocks using Prism.
  • Draft.js Typeaheadstars118 - Support for typeahead functionality.
  • Draft Extendstars109 - Build extensible Draft.js editors with configurable plugins and integrated serialization.
  • Draft.js Codestars104 - A collection of low-level utilities for nicer code editing
  • Draft.js Annotatablestars13 - Out of the box annotation system for Draft.js with support for user-created annotations.
  • Draft.js Regexstars20 - The set of flexible helpers, like regex, blank lines preventing and pasted HTML clearing.

Common Utilities

  • BackDraft.jsstars48 - Function to turn a rawContentBlock into a marked-up string.
  • Draft.js Exporterstars33 - Export and format the content from Draft.js.
  • Draft.js: Export ContentState to HTML - Export ContentState to HTML.
  • Draft.js: Export ContentState to PDFMakestars9 - Export ContentState to PDFMake.
  • Redraftstars257 - Renders the result of Draft.js convertToRaw using provided callbacks, works well with React
  • Draft.js exporter (Ruby)stars17 - Export Draft.js content state into HTML.
  • Draft.js exporter (Python)stars70 - Library to convert Draft.js raw ContentState to HTML
  • Draft.js AST Exporterstars35 - Export content into an abstract syntax tree (AST).
  • Draft.js AST Importerstars13- Import an abstract syntax tree (AST) output from the companion draft-js-ast-exporter.
  • Draft.js Multidecoratorsstars31 - Combine multiple decorators.
  • Draft.js SimpleDecoratorstars23 - Easily create flexible decorators.
  • DraftJS Utilsstars253 - Set of utility functions for DraftJS.
  • DraftJs to HTMLstars257 - Library for generating HTML for DraftJS editor content.
  • Draft Convertstars427 - Extensibly serialize & deserialize Draft.js ContentState with HTML.
  • HTML to DraftJSstars130 - Convert plain HTML to DraftJS Editor content.
  • Draft.js Exporter (Go)stars19 - Export Draft.js content state into HTML.
  • React Native Draft.js Renderstars370 - A React Native render for Draft.js model.
  • Draft.js filtersstars44 - Filter Draft.js content to preserve only the formatting you allow.
  • Stickystars6 - A simple note taking and clipboard managing desktop application

  • How Draft.js Represents Rich Text Data
  • A Beginner’s Guide to Draft.js
  • Implementing todo list in Draft.js
  • Draft.js Pieces
  • Learning Draft.js - Series of blog posts on how to develop with draft.js
  • Why Wagtail’s new editor is built with Draft.js
  • Rethinking rich text pipelines with Draft.js

Live Demos

  • Draft-js Samples - An app with examples and code explanationsstars64
  • Draftail Playground – Wagtail’s Draft.js dependencies as a standalone demo.
  • Draft drag and drop demo for mobile browserstars14

Playgrounds for Examples from Official Repository (v.0.10.0)

  • Rich Text Editor
  • Color Editor
  • Convert from HTML Editor
  • Entity Editor
  • Link Editor
  • Media Editor
  • Plain Text Editor
  • Decorators Editor - Tweet example

  • Douban Read
